rootCause: The shared arduino-thermistor-read process had an empty createItems list, which allowed geothermal quest steps (including calibrate-ground-sensor) to advance after running a process without producing a tangible artifact.
resolution: Added a tangible output item (ground sensor calibration log) to arduino-thermistor-read, updated geothermal quest gates/docs to require that artifact at calibration checkpoints, and added a regression test requiring every process used by geothermal quests to create a tangible item.
